summary: Implemented the Hardening Actions module renderer (US-030). Created `hardening-module.ts` with `renderHardeningModule(container)` that collects all signal data (snapshot, permissions, entropy, permission debt, inferences, threats), evaluates hardening rules, and renders recommendation cards with title, difficulty badge, description, ordered action steps, expected outcome, and related findings. Includes empty-state messaging when no actions are needed. Created `hardening.css` with responsive grid layout, difficulty badge styles (easy/medium/hard), and reduced-motion support. Updated index.ts to re-export the renderer, integrated into main.ts as the final dashboard module, configured vitest for jsdom environment, and updated the main smoke test to account for the new module.
